headline: Packaging Corporation Of America Extension Puts Hydroelectric Compliance In Investor Focus
summary: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) has requested an extension of regulatory deadlines tied to environmental compliance at its International Falls Hydroelectric Project. The extension would give the company more time to complete environmental impact analyses, including work related to fish protection and coordination with federal and state wildlife agencies. This regulatory step relates to the facility’s ongoing permitting and operational requirements and has not been widely...
